heading: Pay and allowances; date of acceptance of promotion
label: 3031 Pay and allowances; date of acceptance of promotion
notes: CodificationProvisions similar to this section are contained in .section 854a–2 of this title

children.heading: Acceptance and date of promotion
children.label: a Acceptance and date of promotion

children.text: is deemed for all purposes to have accepted the promotion upon the date the promotion is made by the President, unless the officer expressly declines the promotion; and

shall receive the pay and allowances of the higher grade from that date unless the officer is entitled under another provision of law to receive the pay and allowances of the higher grade from an earlier date.

children.heading: Oath of office
children.label: b Oath of office
children.text: An officer who subscribed to the oath of office required by shall not be required to renew such oath or to take a new oath upon promotion to a higher grade, if the service of the officer after the taking of such oath is continuous.section 3331 of title 5
